text:
The Last Supper Mocked At Olympics Opening Ceremony By Drag Queens

July 27, 2024

In a very jarring note at the Olympics, a group of drag queens enacted a show that literally mockedThe Last Supper.

The 2024 Paris Olympics kicked off Friday with the procession of athletes, the lighting of the Olympic torch — and an apparent replication of “The Last Supper” performed by drag queens.

Organizers were accused of ridiculing Christianity by featuring more than a dozen drag entertainers posing for a scene reminiscent of the Leonardo da Vinci masterpiece showing Jesus and his disciples sharing their last Passover meal before his betrayal, trial and crucifixion on the cross.

“Drag queens mock Christianity during the Opening Ceremony of the Olympics in Paris as they attempt to recreate da Vinci’s painting of Jesus’ Last Supper,” said Shane Pruitt, a Texas pastor and author, on X. “Not only are Christians the only people that it is socially acceptable to mock … it’s actually celebrated and put front and center.”

It’s as bad as you think it is.

It was repugnant no matter your faith, to deliberately insult Christianity with this degenerate tableau.https://t.co/VPEdRceXPK— Harmeet K. Dhillon (@pnjaban)July 27, 2024

It was repugnant no matter your faith, to deliberately insult Christianity with this degenerate tableau.https://t.co/VPEdRceXPK

Many folks across social media are claiming this outrage is misplaced. We shouldn’t be dismayed that a group of drag queens, including a child and a naked man adorned in blue paint and Christmas lights enact a demented portrayal of The Last Supper. We are just supposed to nod approvingly and applaud their “art.”

I. Don’t. Think. So.

This isn’t the French just being, you know, “French.”  No. This is yet another instance of normalization of a lifestyle that is antithetical to the thousands of Christians around the world.

Politics is downstream from culture. Well, in just the last few years, we’ve seen “culture” declare the mutilation of children to become transgender must be accepted. We’ve seen parents vilified and tracked by the DOJ for refusing to let their children be educated that the drag andtransgender lifestyleis normal. We have a presumptive Presidential nominee, Kamala notJoe, who kicked off part of her campaign by appearing on Ru Paul’s drag show just the other day.

https://twitter.com/RuPaulsDragRace/status/1816518934939742353

Fitting since she’s evidently an honorarysex worker?We have politicians trying to normalize that which is NOT normal or moral.

According to the Olympic Committee who put on this show (which, by the way, included a guillotined Marie Antoinette), we didn’tsee the thingwe thought we saw.

The Olympics said the performance was an “interpretation of the Greek God [of wine and festivity] Dionysus” to make “us aware of the absurdity of violence between human beings.”

But social media users felt that the group was making fun of Christianity and even French politicians denounced the show.

Practicing Catholic Marion Maréchal took to X, saying: “To all the Christians of the world who are watching the #Paris2024 ceremony and felt insulted by this drag queen parody of the Last Supper, know that it is not France that is speaking but a left-wing minority ready for any provocation.”

Yes, they really stated that, and followed up with the same on X.

The interpretation of the Greek God Dionysus makes us aware of the absurdity of violence between human beings.#Paris2024#OpeningCeremonypic.twitter.com/FBlQNNUmvV— The Olympic Games (@Olympics)July 26, 2024

The interpretation of the Greek God Dionysus makes us aware of the absurdity of violence between human beings.#Paris2024#OpeningCeremonypic.twitter.com/FBlQNNUmvV

As many are eloquently pointing out, such as Legal Insurrection’sMary Chastain,The Last Supper falls on Holy Thursday. With this, the Olympics degraded one of the most important parts of Christianity. It was Jesus Last Supper and shortly after, he was betrayed.

What we are seeing is not just a parody or mockery of Christianity. No, what was on display at the Olympics was a degradation.

And yet, we are supposed to be ok with this and stop with the false outrage. Again, NO. What happened there makes a mockery of my faith and the faith of so many others around the world.

The Olympics is supposed to be about a celebration of athletes and their accomplishments. It’s supposed to be about determination, perseverance, and at times just plain grit and courage.

The hideous drag queen act making a mockery of The Last Supper was not that. And I’m sure it was an affront to many of the Christian athletes in attendance.

Friends, my thoughts on the opening ceremony of the Paris Olympics.#Olimpiadas2024#OlympicGamespic.twitter.com/xU1ljFMZft— Bishop Robert Barron (@BishopBarron)July 27, 2024

Friends, my thoughts on the opening ceremony of the Paris Olympics.#Olimpiadas2024#OlympicGamespic.twitter.com/xU1ljFMZft

Yes, they are telling us who they really are. And yet, as both Mary and Bishop Barron point out, they won’t mock ANY other religion, especially the Muslim religion. Why? They will end up dead. What happened withCharlie Hebdois a prime example. But it’s completely ok to make a mockery of Christian faith. Again, no, no it is not.



Yes, there were unforgettable moments during the Opening Ceremony. The best, IMO was Celine Dion. She’s battling a disease for which there is no cure. Yet her grit, determination, and perseverance were on display last night.

Yet to have a group of drag queens put on a display that mocks The Last Supper and the Christian faith of millions around the world is flat out unacceptable. Period.

Feature Photo Credit: The Last Supper and screen shot of drag queen mockery viaBrandon Lorenzo at X,cropped and modified



Christiansdrag queensFranceOlympicsThe Last Supper



I hope fort he sake of the games these clowns were not directly related with organizers and that this was not a formal function. Because if so they deserve to get heat. Like, realistically people have the right to be insulting, sacrilegious degenerates (it’s one reason why Ku Klux Kevin the Rummage Sale Roehm can still be around). And while as a Christian this disgusts and repulses me, I am asked to forgive those that wrong or insult me and pragmatically I understand that we can’t stop people with free will from doing nonsense like this.

But it’s one thing to have your freak show on your own time in private. It’s another thing ENTIRELY to make it so tied to the Olympics. Do these clowns really think that most people – including the Muslim World – will appreciate this? Or what about much of the “developing world”, much of which is devoutly Christian?  It’s a hell of a way to set goodwill and money on fire and bodes badly for the rest of the games.

The Olympic committee already pulled the ceremony from YouTube. Apparently, they didn’t realize that normal people don’t celebrate alternate lifestyles as much as they do.

Did you hear that Grinder (the gay sex app) collapsed during the RNC in Milwaukie?   Yeah … look it up because you only watch cult TV so you have no idea what your republican brethren are doing.   Given how the world is moving away from hypocritical Christians (which is what every supporter of the Malignant Tumor is) you’re going to need to figure out a way to stay in your “safe zone” and only listen to Kid Rock (WARNING:   Your ears are going to bleed listening to that shit), Hulk Hogan and any other “D” celebrity.   Don’t forget to buy your Tesla to support the guy that has too many kids to count with too many women to count; one of whom is a high level executive for his company … boy that’s a load of morals and values.    Snowflakes got triggered and need to find a safe place but that’s getting harder and harder in this world.

“Did you hear that Grinder (the gay sex app) collapsed during the RNC in Milwaukie? Yeah …”

Firstly: That’s Grindr you illiterate moron, not Grinder.

Secondly: I did not hear, nor do I honestly care. But I am not surprised you are trying to focus on homosexual sex in an attempt at “LOOK SQUIRREL” style deflection, Reject Sale Roehm. Still salty about men like Grenell showing you up?

I honestly do not care much about what consenting adults do in privacy, or even in public so long as they are not breaking laws (hence why I react to nonsense such as the edgelord Drag Queen Last Supper and your posting with light irritation). But I do not intend to focus on it.

“look it up”

To which I respond: Why the fuck would I care? This is not a living spit in the eye of most of the world during an international event like this show is.

Also apparently the “surge” is… 1,000 users. Curious sure, but an absolute drop in the freaking bucket against the backdrop that is Milwaukee or even the RNC. And the fact that you think this is significant news (as opposed to this public, internationally provocative incident during the Olympics) says a lot about your judgement. Or lack thereof.

“because you only watch cult TV so you have no idea what your republican brethren are doing.”

I’m sorry, dipshit Discount Roehm says what?

Firstly: We live in the realm world, Kevin. A real world inhabited by people like you where social media and TV are overwhelmingly dominated by people like you. How do you expect we avoid exposure to your “News”/

Secondly: “Our Republican Brethren” amount to a grand total of 1,000 users, in Milwaukee, and I’m guessing a large number of those aren’t Republicans or Conservatives. because Milwaukee, home of Anschluss and Stalin level turnout and voter reports for Brandon and regular stomping ground of The Squad.

But this does fit in rather well with your usual ignorance with source analysis.

“Given how the world is moving away from hypocritical Christians (which is what every supporter of the Malignant Tumor is)”

This is literal fucking delusion.

Firstly: “hypocritical Christians (which is what every supporter of Trump is)” Uh no…

https://www.timesofisrael.com/orthodox-jews-back-trump-by-massive-margin-poll-finds/

I’m pretty sure the average Orthodox Jew is not a Christian, whether hypocritical or not. To say nothing of Sikhs, Atheists, Agnostics, and so on. Are you really so stupid and obsessed with your cult that you do not know that big names like Sargon of Akkad the Youtuber are Atheists?

Apparently not. Which fits well for you.

As for the world “moving away from hypocritical Christians”, it’s doing so less than you’d think, given Evangelicals and especially places like South Korea, China (where your spiritual loves in the CCP are struggling to stomp my siblings in Christ out because they now outnumber the Party), and Subsaharan Africa. But let’s assume that’s the case.  What world do you think that will bring you to, Ku Klux Kevin?

Do you know what happened to your spiritual soulmate the original Roehm? Who lauded the collapse of Christianity right up until he wound up facing SS with pistols sent from his old Comrade?

Do you really think a world with fewer Christians will be more amenable to you, whether as a homosexual, a loudmouth anti-theist, or just in general?

Let’s ask Ishtiwi that.

https://www.newsweek.com/prominent-hamas-commander-was-executed-after-accusations-gay-sex-432343

Or Malmo.

“you’re going to need to figure out a way to stay in your “safe zone” and only listen to Kid Rock ”

This is hilarious to me, since it is so obviously you projecting your own weaknesses onto us. Including how you hang out like a vile parasite on this blog but take in nothing, while making provably false claims like how all Trump supporters are “hypocritical Christians” (and in doing so underlining how you neither know or care about the effect Jew Bashing from you and your ilk have had on Jewish voting patterns, among others).

We deal with you and your viewpoints day in and day out. It is why I can analyze and dissect you quite readily. It is you who do not know the SLIGHTEST THING about us.

“(WARNING: Your ears are going to bleed listening to that shit), ”

Funny, I’m not the biggest fan of Kid Rock but my ears have never bled listening to them. Perhaps you are just fragile? Perhaps you should get medical attention for that?

“Hulk Hogan and any other “D” celebrity.”

Most of the D Class Celebrities are little better than you, Fascist.

“Don’t forget to buy your Tesla to support the guy that has too many kids to count with too many women to count; one of whom is a high level executive for his company … ”

I’ll consider it when and if they get more economical and useful. Until then my family has some perfectly useful ones.

“boy that’s a load of morals and values”

You don’t seem to understand how hypocrites are generally better than unalloyed scum because on some level the hypocrites either realize or need to act like they know what they are doing is wrong, unlike you who endlessly demonizes, discreetly advocates for violence, and generally is scum. Rodrigo Borgia was a bad man and a sub par Pope but at least he did not desecrate canon law or theology like the current Marxist Pope has, and he at least recognized something of the value and importance the office he stole had.

“Snowflakes got triggered and need to find a safe place but that’s getting harder and harder in this world.”

Cute Kevin. Now stop looking in the mirror.

PS: Is that a threat from you? Considering how you act like a totalitarian, espouse their views, justify and deflect about violence by your kin, and so on, I would not put it past you.

People like you make me understand why Arabs throw gays off of rooftops.

You sound panicky, Kev. 14.5 million Democrat primary voters tossed under the bus in order to pull a puppet switch is just too obvious even for people in Rio Linda?

Your cries of “MUH DEMOCRACY” were never sincere. You’re an old Soviet retread pretending to be an American. You SO want to be part of the Inner Party, but hey. You’re the first on the line to go if Harris is fraudulently installed in the Oval office.

Sad for you.

His kind are losing as the pendulum is swinging the other way. They no longer have control over culture and their insults are simply getting met with mockery.

France isn’t a Christian country, BTW. A core tenant of their constitution is their secularism. Also, that was a runway, not a table.

And FYI, Leonardo DaVinci, who painted the painting centuries after Christ’s death, was gay. He was charged with sodomy at one point and had to leave town for a year.

Not everything is about the Christian faith.  Tell me, who are the snowflakes again? I am a lifelong Christian BTW and even my first thought was the ties to Ancient Greece rather than Christianity. You do realize the original games were played without clothes and in honor of Zeus, the king of the gods, right?

” I am a lifelong Christian BTW”.. Just like biden is a “catholic” you’re a liar and a fraud..  I’m now convinced that you and kevin share a “brain” and that together, your Q barely reaches room temp..Kindly fuck off and let the adults talk..

“France isn’t a Christian country, BTW. A core tenant of their constitution is their secularism.”

This is far closer to being the truth, especially given the hostile approach to secularization that the French constitution and politics takes in contrast to the American one. But even with those massive caveats a majority of French are still Catholic Christians and the traditions of the country are deeply Christian.

“Also, that was a runway, not a table.”

I’ll take shit nobody here was talking about for 1,500 Euros, Alex. Not that that makes even the slightest goddamn difference since it was obviously being framed to look like a table when photographed from that angle.

“And FYI, Leonardo DaVinci, who painted the painting centuries after Christ’s death, was gay. He was charged with sodomy at one point and had to leave town for a year.”

Dubious; we have a fair few records of him engaging with homosexual affairs, but also some heterosexual ones. He seems to have been a bisexual or pansexual with homosexual preference.

But the relevance? Are you literally just a cutout of Kevin’s?  Also this is not the win you seem to think it is, if you’ve ever bothered reading the man’s writings like the Codex Leicester/Microsoft. Man had some pretty strong opinions on appearing seemly in public. Please please please try to use a dead polymath classicist as some kind of cover for this insulting degeneracy that would have horrified almost every single Italian of the era that ever dreamed of resurrecting the Olympics as well as all the diplomats, INCLUDING those that were homosexual or engaged in sodomy, precisely because of what a public faux pas this was. The Banquet of Chestnuts by the Borgia was an infamous scandal in spite of it being A: Overwhelmingly heterosexual, and B: Done in private out of the public eye.

Please try and tell us how this clown show would be approved. Especially by a man obsessed with decorum and aesthetics.

“Not everything is about the Christian faith.”

I’ll leave that between you and God.

However, THIS ABSOLUTELY IS. Or are you ignoring the fact that this is a clear parody of one of the most beloved piestic works in the world, or a modern Greco-Roman Pagan imitation of it (namely “The Feast of the Gods” by Jan Harmensz van Biljert, who clearly and avowedly took The Last Supper as an inspiration). You also are ignoring the fact that…

A: This kind of thing would still be garnish and an eye sore to most of the world even if it wasn’t a disrespectful parody of Christianity.

B: That it isn’t just “the Christian faith” that takes issue with this; or are you going to try and claim Hamas in the Gaza Strip would welcome this kind of show?

C: The Olympic Authorities obviously have realized what a colossal farqup this is, which is why they are trying to memory hole it 1984 style, complete with abusive DMCA takedowns. While I despise them for that cowardice and hypocrisy, it is at least an alimony to it.

“Tell me, who are the snowflakes again? ”

The Olympic Authorities. They obviously greenlit this abomination and insulted most of the planet with it, but do not have the courage to stand by it.

Us? We’re just calling it out for what it is. A disrespectful, NSFW, sacrilegious defilement of peoples’ faith in what is supposed to be an all ages.

“I am a lifelong Christian BTW”

This is me Pressing D to Doubt. Especially given your self-righteous tolerance for blasphemy and other BS.

“and even my first thought was the ties to Ancient Greece rather than Christianity. ”

That’s cute Felicia, but it does not change the points we raised.

“You do realize the original games were played without clothes and in honor of Zeus, the king of the gods, right?”

You do realize that they were also male only with strict limitations on who could even watch it? And for that matter that people like these performers would run the risk of being executed in painful and public fashion for at a minimum public indecency back in Old Greece?

At the risk of bringing up a point you clowns like making, it’s Current Year. The Olympic Games have changed. But there is no variation or time in them when this would not have been an unwelcome, disgusting eye sore. Again, the Olympic Authorities at least belated recognized this even if you can’t.

Tell me, who are the snowflakes again?

The difference between my side and yours is we aren’t calling for the utter destruction of the artist or the performers. You and your kind are the ones who get offended when someone says something true like “There are only two genders” and you go after them with an unholy fury.

The performance at the Olympics was a depiction of Bacchanal the celebration of the Feast of Dionysus the Greek God of Wine & Theater. You know, the same Greek culture that created the Olympics BEFORE Christianity was even invented? It had NOTHING to do with the Christian cult or their Last Supper.

Did you get triggered?   If so, you may be a Snowflake.

“The performance at the Olympics was a depiction of Bacchanal the celebration of the Feast of Dionysus the Greek God of Wine & Theater. You know, the same Greek culture that created the Olympics BEFORE Christianity was even invented? It had NOTHING to do with the Christian cult or their Last Supper.”

Yeah yeah yeah, that’s cute bullshit gaslighting Felicia. Problem is it doesn’t hold up.

Firstly: How many depictions of Bacchanal have you seem? Especially ones that look like this? Obviously not a goddamn lot, starting with the fact that (in addition to being even less SFW than this eyesore was), the traditional portrayal and vantage point for it (especially this shot) were significantly different. In particular the participants in a Bacchanal are usually portrayed as either laying down, or standing up. Not much in between (which isn’t that much of a surprise when you remember ancient Greece was not big on chairs).

There’s a reason the damage control the Olympics and other apologists of this clusterfarq are trying to run is that it is based on “The Feast of the Gods” by Jan Harmensz van Biljert….. but the problem is that van Biljert worked on this in the 1980s and it was self-avowedly based off of Leonardo’s The Last Supper.

So this was an NSFW “performance theater” based either on The Last Supper, or on The Feast of the Gods and thus indirectly on The Last Supper. Which raises the question of why you idiots thought this would EVER play well in a world that still primarily follows the Abrahamic Faith, and where most of those that don’t would still find this a disgusting and obscene thing to put in front of the public.

Secondly: Even if this was based purely on the Bacchanal (and it wasn’t), that just brings us back to WHO ON GOD’S GREEN EARTH THOUGHT SUCH AN EXPLICITLY SEXUAL DISPLAY WAS A GOOD THING TO OPEN THE OLYMPICS WITH DURING WHAT IS SUPPOSED TO BE A PRIME TIME ALL AGES DISPLAY AT AN INTERNATIONAL SHOW?!?!

‘See, chud, we weren’t insulting Christianity, we were just insulting Greco-Roman Paganism and the eyesore of anyone with taste, kindly ignore our divergences in depictions of Bacchanals to mirror depictions of the Last Supper.”

Ok idiot, even assuming I bought that it is still a goddamn bad idea on pretty much every level. And the kicker is, THE OLYMPIC COMMITTEE NOW RECOGNIZES THIS, which is why they are trying to abuse DMCA to avoid it.

“Did you get triggered? If so, you may be a Snowflake.”

There’s no good reason not to be triggered about a bunch of garnish idiots portraying an offensively sexualized, sacrilegious display online. And if you think Christians are the only ones disgusted, you have lost the plot completely. You think most Greco-Roman Pagans like this? Jews? Muslims?

Or even your average Reddit Atheist who happens to be young enough?

This isn’t a paltry thing, no matter how much you try to make it so. This was a visual eyesore during an event that is supposed to be about the height of public decorum and international affairs. Which is why in spite of you and your sock puppet throwing up chaff like “Don’t you know the Olympic Games were originally Pagan and done Nude and to honor Zeus chud?” (let’s leave aside how the ancient Greeks would have executed everyone involved in this for sacrilege and/or public indecency back in the day), or “Don’t t you know Leonardo da Vinci was gay?” (Debatable but close enough – probably gay-leaning bisexual, but how you think that means he’d be happy with an unaesthetic eye sore stinking up public affairs is another question; and I use “think” loosely with you).

It’s not surprising you applaud this, Rummage Sale Roehm. But you seem to ignore why almost nobody else is. And the outcry and “snowflake” move has paid off, which is why the Olympic Committee is scrambling.

As they well should. If you’re going to be a bitchy drama queen who thinks they can intimidate most of the world by being a snowflake and generating public outrage, you need to be reminded that we can play the game too and even better than you can, since we are the majority. Especially in this case where the display offended far more than just Bible Thumping Christians.

PS: Would you like to do this display in Gaza, Honorary Gigolo Sex Trafficking Goon? I’m sure Hamas would be happy to take you and other performers to a convenient rooftop for the occasion.

The performance at the Olympics was a depiction of Bacchanal the celebration of the Feast of Dionysus the Greek God of Wine & Theater.

2/10ths of a second in basic research finds “Official France TV said it was the ‘Last Supper’. Screenshots were taken.

https://x.com/BrendanMcInnis/status/1817449502506422405

I really hope you have a therapist for your need to be humiliated by total strangers.

“WHO ON GOD’S GREEN EARTH THOUGHT SUCH AN EXPLICITLY SEXUAL DISPLAY WAS A GOOD THING TO OPEN THE OLYMPICS WITH DURING WHAT IS SUPPOSED TO BE A PRIME TIME ALL AGES DISPLAY AT AN INTERNATIONAL SHOW?!?!”

When children, who are the prime target of the trans religious sect, were likely to be watching.  Catch them young is clearly the motto of the perverted trans mob.

Not often that I must correct myself, but I thank the people here who showed me my error on the other post.

Being in possession of an art history education that stopped before it devolved into finger painting and blowing pigment through cocaine straws by psychopathic no-talents, I was referring to the classic painting by Giovanni Bellini in the 16th century.

I was not aware that this “performance” was simply a LARP of a Christian-bashing piece of garbage incorrectly called “art” from the 1980s.

It is apparently much more faithful to that load of excrement. My apologies.

It wasn’t simply a LARP of that art (which at least is moderately well done). It was literally called the Last Supper (in an overly long and somewhat clever French pun comparing their word for Last Supper or Communion to the Seine). It obviously drew inspiration from both art works, but the comparison to the Last Supper was explicit.

You all had to “tell people” what the F³ dudes-in-dresses were trying to mimic.

Shame on the lot of you.
